name: Salesforce
one_liner: Leading enterprise CRM for sales, service, and marketing.
auth_note: OAuth2 (connected apps) is standard; JWT bearer and username-password flows also supported. Free Developer Edition org self-serve.
access_note: Free Developer Edition org signup gives full API access to create your own connected app and OAuth credentials.
mcp_note: Salesforce ships an official MCP server (salesforcecli/mcp, 60+ tools) as part of its CLI/DX toolchain.
main_blocker: None; free dev org plus OAuth2 connected apps, very broad REST/SOAP/GraphQL/Bulk surface.

name: HubSpot
one_liner: All-in-one CRM for marketing, sales, and service.
auth_note: OAuth2 for public/marketplace apps; private-app access tokens for single-account integrations. Legacy hapikey API keys deprecated. Free developer account available.
access_note: Free HubSpot account plus free developer account let you create apps and private-app tokens yourself.
mcp_note: HubSpot runs an official remote MCP server (developers.hubspot.com/ai-tools/mcp); currently read-leaning, community servers add writes.
main_blocker: None; free dev account, self-serve OAuth2/private-app tokens, broad REST surface.

name: Pipedrive
one_liner: Sales-pipeline CRM for tracking deals and follow-ups.
auth_note: Personal API token obtainable from account settings; OAuth2 for marketplace apps. Developer sandbox account available.
access_note: API token self-generated from Pipedrive settings; free developer sandbox and OpenAPI specs published.
mcp_note: No clearly official server; multiple community MCP servers exist (read-only and full-CRUD variants).
main_blocker: None; self-serve token, sandbox, broad REST API and official client libs.

name: Attio
one_liner: Modern, flexible CRM for teams and workflows.
auth_note: Workspace-scoped access tokens (Bearer) created self-serve under Settings > Developers; OAuth2 for multi-workspace published apps.
access_note: Free plan lets you create an integration and generate a scoped access token yourself.
mcp_note: Attio offers an official MCP server consolidating record/list/task/note operations; community servers also exist.
main_blocker: None; self-serve scoped access token on free plan, clean REST API.

name: Twenty
one_liner: Open-source, self-hostable CRM alternative to Salesforce.
auth_note: API keys / access tokens for REST and GraphQL; OAuth also supported. Being open-source you can self-host and mint your own tokens.
access_note: Open-source and self-hostable; cloud and local instances both let you generate API keys yourself for free.
mcp_note: No official Twenty MCP confirmed; community MCP servers wrap its GraphQL/REST API.
main_blocker: None; open-source, self-hostable, self-serve tokens, REST+GraphQL. Surface still maturing.

name: Podio
one_liner: Customizable work-management and CRM app platform.
auth_note: OAuth2; per-app API keys generated self-serve from account settings. Now owned/maintained by Citrix/Progress ShareFile.
access_note: Grab an API key per app from account settings; free/standard accounts can obtain credentials.
mcp_note: No official MCP server found; unclear community coverage for this legacy platform.
main_blocker: Legacy platform under Citrix with uncertain ongoing investment; API self-serve but ecosystem/maintenance risk.

name: Zoho CRM
one_liner: Cloud CRM within Zoho's broad business-app suite.
auth_note: OAuth2 only; register a self-client/server app in the Zoho API console to get client id/secret and tokens. Region-specific data centers.
access_note: Free Zoho CRM edition plus API console self-client registration yields OAuth credentials at no cost.
mcp_note: No confirmed official production MCP; community/third-party servers exist. Composio wraps Zoho as a toolkit.
main_blocker: OAuth2 self-client setup plus multi-region data-center routing add integration friction; otherwise obtainable free.

name: Close
one_liner: Sales CRM with built-in calling and email.
auth_note: API keys for scripts (self-generated in settings) or OAuth2 for user-facing integrations.
access_note: API key self-generated from Close settings; free trial available to obtain credentials.
mcp_note: Close ships an official MCP server (developer.close.com/mcp, help.close.com/docs/mcp-server).
main_blocker: None; self-serve API key, official MCP, broad REST API.

name: Copper
one_liner: CRM built for and integrated with Google Workspace.
auth_note: REST API uses API key plus user email headers; OAuth2 also documented for apps. No free tier (trial only), so a paid/trial account is needed to reach settings.
access_note: Copper has no free plan; API key is self-serve from settings but only within a trial or paid subscription.
mcp_note: No official MCP; several community/third-party servers (Apideck, Pipedream, n8n templates) exist.
main_blocker: No free tier: needs a paid (or time-limited trial) Copper account before the self-serve API key is reachable.

name: DealCloud
one_liner: Intapp deal/relationship CRM for private capital markets.
auth_note: OAuth2 client-credentials via admin-provisioned API keys / authorization tokens within a licensed Intapp DealCloud tenant.
access_note: Requires a paid enterprise Intapp DealCloud tenant; API keys are provisioned by a workspace admin, not self-serve signup.
mcp_note: DealCloud docs announce an official MCP server (launching July 2026); Python and C# SDKs also provided.
main_blocker: No self-serve access: needs a licensed enterprise DealCloud/Intapp tenant and admin-provisioned API credentials.

name: Zendesk
one_liner: Cloud customer service, ticketing and help center platform.
auth_note: API-token (via Basic auth) plus OAuth2 access tokens (authorization code and client credentials); email+password Basic also supported.
access_note: Public, documented API; free trial available and OAuth app / API token created yourself in admin settings.
mcp_note: No first-party Zendesk MCP confirmed; community/third-party MCP servers and Composio MCP exist.
main_blocker: None; self-serve API token or OAuth app on a free trial account.

name: Intercom
one_liner: AI-first customer messaging, support and help desk platform.
auth_note: Access token auto-issued for private apps in Developer Hub; OAuth2 (Bearer) for public apps acting on other workspaces.
access_note: Free developer workspace; access token available immediately, OAuth toggle self-serve (public app listing needs review).
mcp_note: Intercom ships an official hosted remote MCP server (developers.intercom.com/docs/guides/mcp); US-hosted workspaces only.
main_blocker: None for private apps; public-app distribution requires OAuth review.

name: Freshdesk
one_liner: Freshworks cloud helpdesk and ticketing software.
auth_note: Personal API key sent via HTTP Basic auth (apikey:X); no OAuth for the core helpdesk API.
access_note: Public REST API; API key found in agent profile settings, free trial available.
mcp_note: No official Freshdesk MCP confirmed; Composio and other community MCP servers exist.
main_blocker: None; self-serve API key on a free trial account.

name: Front
one_liner: Shared inbox and customer communication collaboration platform.
auth_note: API tokens for direct/single-instance access; OAuth2 mandatory for public/partner apps.
access_note: Free developer account and self-serve API tokens for own workspace; publishing to App Store needs partner review.
mcp_note: No confirmed first-party Front MCP; third-party/Composio MCP available.
main_blocker: None for own workspace; public app listing requires OAuth and Front review.

name: Pylon
one_liner: B2B customer support platform built around Slack/Teams.
auth_note: Bearer API tokens; only Admin users can create API tokens in workspace settings.
access_note: API is self-serve once you have a workspace, but Pylon is a paid product with no open free tier; admin role required to mint tokens.
mcp_note: No official or clearly documented Pylon MCP server found.
main_blocker: Paid product; requires a Pylon workspace and admin rights to obtain an API token.

name: LiveAgent
one_liner: Multichannel helpdesk and live chat ticketing software.
auth_note: API v3 key passed in 'apikey' request header; keys created in Configuration > System > API with per-key permissions.
access_note: Public REST API v3; admin generates keys directly, free trial available.
mcp_note: No official LiveAgent MCP server found.
main_blocker: None; self-serve API key on a trial account.

name: Plain
one_liner: API-first B2B customer support tool for engineers.
auth_note: Bearer API key (Authorization: Bearer) generated in Settings > API Keys with granular permission scopes.
access_note: Self-serve API keys; official @team-plain/graphql typed npm client provided.
mcp_note: No confirmed first-party MCP; Composio hosts a Plain MCP/toolkit.
main_blocker: None; self-serve GraphQL API key, well-documented.

name: Help Scout
one_liner: Shared-inbox help desk and knowledge base software.
auth_note: Mailbox API v2 uses OAuth2 (authorization code and client credentials); HTTPS-only with CORS support.
access_note: Public REST API; OAuth2 app credentials created yourself, free trial available.
mcp_note: No confirmed official MCP; Composio hosts a Help Scout MCP/toolkit (~129 tools).
main_blocker: None; self-serve OAuth2 app on a trial account.

name: Gorgias
one_liner: Ecommerce-focused helpdesk for Shopify support teams.
auth_note: Private apps authenticate with an API key via HTTP Basic (email as username); OAuth2 mandatory for public App Store apps.
access_note: Self-serve API key from your account; Gorgias is a paid product but offers a trial and keys are obtainable within it.
mcp_note: No confirmed first-party MCP; Composio hosts a Gorgias MCP/toolkit (~32 tools).
main_blocker: Paid product; requires a Gorgias account (trial) to generate the API key.

name: Gladly
one_liner: Enterprise people-centered customer service and support platform.
auth_note: API tokens tied to a Gladly user with the API User permission, passed via Basic auth in the Authorization header over HTTPS.
access_note: Enterprise product with no published pricing; account requires a sales demo/quote, so API creds are not self-serve for outsiders.
mcp_note: No official Gladly MCP server found.
main_blocker: No self-serve signup; requires an enterprise Gladly account (contact-sales) before you can create API tokens.

name: Slack
one_liner: Team messaging and collaboration platform
auth_note: OAuth2 for apps you create at api.slack.com; bot/user tokens issued per workspace.
access_note: Anyone can create a Slack app and install to a workspace; distribution to others may need review.
mcp_note: Widely used community/reference Slack MCP servers; no clearly Slack-maintained official one.
main_blocker: None; self-serve OAuth app with broad Web API.

name: Twilio
one_liner: Programmable SMS, voice and messaging APIs
auth_note: Basic auth with Account SID + Auth Token; scoped API Keys also supported.
access_note: Free trial account with credit; upgrade to pay-as-you-go.
mcp_note: Twilio published an (alpha) official MCP server for SMS/voice.
main_blocker: None; self-serve keys and broad REST API.

name: Zoho Cliq
one_liner: Zoho team chat and collaboration app
auth_note: OAuth 2.0 token required per request; register client in Zoho Developer Console.
access_note: Free Zoho account; self-register OAuth client in Zoho API Console.
mcp_note: No official Zoho Cliq MCP identified; community options unclear.
main_blocker: None; self-serve OAuth, though surface narrower than Slack.

name: Lark (Larksuite)
one_liner: Enterprise messaging, docs and collaboration suite
auth_note: OAuth2 plus tenant/app access tokens; self-serve app creation (incl. OAuth device flow).
access_note: Create custom app in developer console; org-wide publishing needs admin approval.
mcp_note: Official larksuite/lark-openapi-mcp server on GitHub.
main_blocker: None for dev; publishing to a tenant needs admin approval.

name: Pumble
one_liner: Team chat app, Slack-style messaging
auth_note: API key generated after installing the Pumble API addon in the workspace.
access_note: Requires installing the API-keys addon; then keys are self-generated.
mcp_note: Community Pumble MCP servers exist (e.g. on LobeHub).
main_blocker: Addon install requirement and narrow endpoint set (messages/reactions/channels).

name: Discord
one_liner: Community chat, voice and bot platform
auth_note: OAuth2 for apps; bot token for the Bot API. Composio uses OAuth2.
access_note: Create an application/bot in the Discord Developer Portal for free.
mcp_note: No official Discord-maintained MCP; active community servers.
main_blocker: None; self-serve bot/OAuth app.

name: Telegram
one_liner: Messaging app with open Bot API
auth_note: Bot token from BotFather; MTProto client API uses api_id/api_hash.
access_note: Create a bot via BotFather instantly and free.
mcp_note: Multiple community Telegram MCP servers.
main_blocker: None; instant free bot token.

name: WhatsApp Business
one_liner: Business messaging via Meta WhatsApp Cloud API
auth_note: Meta system-user/access tokens via a Meta app; only Business accounts supported.
access_note: Requires Meta app, WhatsApp Business Account, and business verification.
mcp_note: Community WhatsApp MCP servers; no official Meta MCP.
main_blocker: Meta business verification and app setup friction before production.

name: Aircall
one_liner: Cloud phone system for support and sales
auth_note: Basic auth with api_id:api_token from dashboard; OAuth required for Marketplace partner apps.
access_note: Need a paid Aircall account to generate API keys; OAuth apps gated to partners.
mcp_note: No official Aircall MCP identified.
main_blocker: Requires a paid Aircall subscription; OAuth distribution is partner-gated.

name: Vonage
one_liner: Communications APIs for SMS, voice, verify
auth_note: API key + secret (Basic) for most APIs; JWT/application creds for Voice and Messages.
access_note: Self-serve signup with free trial credit; keys issued on account creation.
mcp_note: No official Vonage MCP confirmed.
main_blocker: None; self-serve keys, broad REST API.

name: Google Ads
one_liner: Google's advertising platform API for campaign management
auth_note: OAuth2 via a Google Cloud project (user or service-account flow); every call also needs an approved developer token.
access_note: Developer token must be approved by Google; tokens start at basic/test access and require review for standard production access.
mcp_note: No official MCP; Composio ships a hosted Google Ads MCP server/toolkit.
main_blocker: Developer-token approval plus OAuth app setup and gRPC/client-library complexity.

name: Meta Ads
one_liner: Meta Marketing API for Facebook and Instagram ad campaigns
auth_note: OAuth2 access tokens (user or system-user) against the Graph API; app-scoped tokens.
access_note: Standard Access is immediate for owned ad accounts; managing third-party accounts (advanced ads_management) needs App Review plus Business Verification.
mcp_note: No official MCP; Composio offers a Meta Ads toolkit/MCP.
main_blocker: App Review and Business Verification required for advanced/third-party ad access.

name: LinkedIn Ads
one_liner: LinkedIn Marketing API for ad campaigns and reporting
auth_note: OAuth2 3-legged authorization-code flow against versioned Rest.li APIs.
access_note: Requires applying to the LinkedIn Marketing Developer Platform; access request plus company verification and integration-requirement review.
mcp_note: Composio has a general LinkedIn toolkit/MCP, but it is not ads-specific; no official ads MCP.
main_blocker: Marketing Developer Platform access approval and company verification.

name: GoHighLevel
one_liner: White-label agency CRM and marketing automation platform API
auth_note: V2 API uses OAuth2 (marketplace apps, client-id/secret) or Private Integration Tokens for single-account tools; V1 keys deprecated Dec 2025.
access_note: Free developer-marketplace signup to create an app and get OAuth creds, but using the API needs a paid HighLevel account/subscription.
mcp_note: Official MCP status not confirmed; no Composio toolkit found.
main_blocker: Requires a paid GoHighLevel subscription to have an account/data to operate on.

name: Mailchimp
one_liner: Email marketing platform with a REST Marketing API
auth_note: API key from the dashboard or OAuth2; datacenter-prefixed base URL (dc.api.mailchimp.com/3.0).
access_note: Create a free account and generate an API key immediately from the dashboard; free tier available.
mcp_note: No official MCP; Composio offers a Mailchimp toolkit.

name: Klaviyo
one_liner: Email and SMS marketing automation platform API
auth_note: Private API key (server-side, Klaviyo-API-Key header), OAuth2 for tech partners, and public 6-char company ID for client-side tracking.
access_note: Free account; generate a scoped private key under Settings > API keys; free tier available.
mcp_note: No confirmed official MCP; Composio offers a Klaviyo toolkit.

name: systeme.io
one_liner: All-in-one funnel builder and marketing platform with public API
auth_note: API key sent in the X-API-Key header; up to 3 keys generated from profile settings.
access_note: Free account available; generate an API key in dashboard profile settings, no approval needed.
mcp_note: No known MCP server or Composio toolkit.

name: Pinterest
one_liner: Pinterest API for Pins, boards, and ads (v5)
auth_note: OAuth2 with authorization-code, client-credentials, and refresh-token grants; v5 API.
access_note: App approval grants Trial access (1000 req/day, pins hidden, 24h test tokens); Standard/production access requires a demo-video review.
mcp_note: Composio lists a Pinterest page but with 0 tools/triggers; no functional MCP or toolkit.
main_blocker: Trial-to-Standard access approval (demo video review) needed for real production use.

name: Threads (Meta)
one_liner: Meta Threads API for posts, replies, and insights
auth_note: OAuth2 Threads user access tokens (app-scoped); short-lived (1h) and long-lived (60d, refreshable) tokens.
access_note: threads_basic works for app testers; publishing, replies, and insights permissions require App Review and a published app.
mcp_note: No official MCP and no dedicated Composio toolkit found.
main_blocker: App Review required to publish/manage beyond test users.

name: SendGrid
one_liner: Twilio SendGrid transactional and marketing email API
auth_note: Scoped API keys sent as Bearer tokens against the v3 REST API.
access_note: Free account with a free tier; create scoped API keys programmatically or in the dashboard (sender verification required).
mcp_note: No official MCP; Composio offers a SendGrid toolkit.

name: Shopify
one_liner: Leading hosted ecommerce platform for online stores.
auth_note: Apps use OAuth2 access tokens; custom apps in a store use Admin API access tokens.
access_note: Create a public/custom app yourself in Partner dashboard or store admin; free dev stores available.
mcp_note: Official Storefront MCP and Customer Accounts MCP servers on shopify.dev, plus a Dev MCP.
main_blocker: None; self-serve app creation with free dev store.

name: WooCommerce
one_liner: Open-source WordPress plugin turning sites into stores.
auth_note: REST API uses consumer key/secret over HTTPS (Basic auth); OAuth1.0a for non-HTTPS. Keys self-generated in WP admin.
access_note: Generate keys in WooCommerce > Settings > Advanced > REST API; free but requires your own WordPress+WooCommerce install.
mcp_note: Community WooCommerce MCP servers exist; no official one confirmed.
main_blocker: Need a self-hosted WordPress/WooCommerce store to test against.

name: BigCommerce
one_liner: SaaS ecommerce platform with open, API-first architecture.
auth_note: Store-level API accounts issue OAuth tokens (X-Auth-Token); created in store control panel.
access_note: Free trial store lets you create API account credentials yourself; no approval needed.
mcp_note: No official MCP confirmed this research.
main_blocker: None significant; trial store + self-serve token.

name: Salesforce Commerce Cloud
one_liner: Enterprise B2C/B2B commerce platform, contract-only access.
auth_note: OAuth2 via SLAS/Account Manager; every call needs a client ID and realm ID from your AE.
access_note: Requires an enterprise contract; on-demand sandboxes need purchased sandbox credits via Account Executive. No free trial.
mcp_note: No MCP server found.
main_blocker: No self-serve instance; requires paid enterprise realm/sandbox credits.

name: Magento (Adobe Commerce)
one_liner: Open-source and enterprise commerce platform, self-hostable.
auth_note: OAuth1.0a for integrations, token-based (admin/integration tokens), JWT for GraphQL customer/admin; SOAP also supported.
access_note: Magento Open Source is free and self-hostable; create integration + token in admin. Adobe Commerce edition is paid/enterprise.
mcp_note: No official MCP confirmed.
main_blocker: Requires standing up and hosting a Magento instance (heavy setup).

name: Squarespace
one_liner: Website builder with commerce APIs for merchants.
auth_note: API keys for custom apps require Commerce Advanced plan; OAuth is only via Squarespace Extensions (approval form required).
access_note: Commerce API key access requires a paid Commerce Advanced plan; OAuth Extensions are gated behind an approval form.
mcp_note: No MCP server found.
main_blocker: Requires paid Commerce Advanced plan; OAuth path needs approval.

name: Ecwid
one_liner: Embeddable store widget by Lightspeed with REST API.
auth_note: OAuth2 for public apps; custom/own-store apps can skip OAuth and use a non-expiring store access token.
access_note: Free plan available; register custom app to get access tokens for your own store without approval.
mcp_note: No MCP server found.
main_blocker: Public app listing needs review, but own-store token access is self-serve.

name: Gumroad
one_liner: Platform for creators selling digital products directly.
auth_note: OAuth2 with application access token; generate app and token in account settings (Advanced).
access_note: Create an application and get an access token yourself from your Gumroad account.
mcp_note: Composio offers a hosted Gumroad MCP (7 tools); no official Gumroad MCP.
main_blocker: Narrow API surface (products, sales, subscribers, licenses).

name: Amazon Selling Partner
one_liner: Amazon's API for sellers and vendors to automate operations.
auth_note: Login with Amazon (LWA) OAuth2 credentials; public apps use OAuth flows, private apps self-authorized.
access_note: Must register as developer, hold a professional selling account, submit a reviewed developer profile; restricted (PII) roles need extra architecture review.
mcp_note: No official Amazon SP-API MCP found.
main_blocker: Reviewed developer registration + Pro seller account, but self-obtainable with effort.

name: fanbasis
one_liner: Merchant-of-record payments/checkout platform for creators and coaches.
auth_note: REST API keys passed via x-api-key header, generated from the FanBasis dashboard (per public API reference).
access_note: Public REST reference (apidocs.fan) and npm checkout SDK exist; keys self-generated, but full dev docs (dev-docs.fanbasis.com) are login-gated and it requires a FanBasis merchant account.
mcp_note: No MCP server found.
main_blocker: Obscure vendor; primary docs login-gated and require a FanBasis merchant account to obtain keys.

name: DataForSEO
one_liner: SEO, SERP, keyword and backlink data API provider.
auth_note: HTTP Basic auth; auto-generated API login:password Base64-encoded in Authorization header (not the account password). Confirmed on docs.dataforseo.com/v3/auth.
access_note: Open self-serve signup, prepaid/pay-as-you-go credits, low entry cost; no approval needed.
mcp_note: DataForSEO publishes an official MCP server (dataforseo-mcp-server); also surfaced via Composio DataForSEO MCP.
main_blocker: None; self-serve Basic-auth REST API with free credits.

name: SE Ranking
one_liner: SEO platform: keyword, rank, backlink and audit data API.
auth_note: Single API key created in dashboard, passed as 'Token YOUR_API_KEY' Authorization header (or token param) across Data API and Project API. Confirmed on docs.
access_note: Requires a paid SE Ranking subscription; API consumes account/API credits. Obtainable but not free.
mcp_note: Official hosted MCP server at api.seranking.com/mcp with 160+ tools, built/managed by SE Ranking. Confirmed on docs.
main_blocker: Paid subscription and API credits required to obtain a working key.

name: Ahrefs
one_liner: SEO toolset: Site Explorer, keywords, backlinks, rank data API.
auth_note: API v3 uses an API key/token. Free limited test queries on all plans; full programmatic use tied to plan API units.
access_note: API v3 requires a paid plan (Lite+ for units; Enterprise ~$1,499/mo for full access and pay-as-you-go overages). Costly but obtainable.
mcp_note: Official hosted MCP at api.ahrefs.com/mcp (Lite plan or higher); GitHub local server is deprecated. Confirmed via docs/github.
main_blocker: Paid plan gate; meaningful volume needs expensive Advanced/Enterprise tiers.

name: MrScraper
one_liner: AI web scraping API with proxies and headless browsers.
auth_note: Scraper API uses an API token passed in the x-api-token header. Confirmed on docs.mrscraper.com activating-api page.
access_note: Self-serve dashboard signup generates the API token; specific free-trial terms not confirmed from docs.
mcp_note: No official or community MCP server found for MrScraper.
main_blocker: None material; self-serve token-based REST API, though smaller/less-proven vendor.

name: Apify
one_liner: Actor marketplace platform for web scraping and automation.
auth_note: API token via Bearer Authorization header (or query param); public Actors callable without auth. Confirmed on docs.apify.com/api/v2.
access_note: Open self-serve signup with a free tier of platform credits; thousands of ready-made Actors.
mcp_note: Official Apify MCP server at mcp.apify.com (apify/actors-mcp-server) exposing Store Actors as tools. Verified.
main_blocker: None; self-serve REST API with free tier and rich SDK/MCP.

name: Firecrawl
one_liner: LLM-focused API to scrape, crawl, map and extract web content.
auth_note: REST uses Bearer API key (fc-...); MCP endpoint additionally supports OAuth2 for keyless client sign-in. Confirmed on docs.firecrawl.dev.
access_note: Self-serve signup with free tier; tiered subscription for higher rate/concurrency limits.
mcp_note: Official Firecrawl MCP server (firecrawl-mcp-server; mcp.firecrawl.dev) with OAuth support. Verified.
main_blocker: None; self-serve Bearer-key REST API plus official MCP.

name: Bright Data
one_liner: Web data platform: proxies, Web Unlocker, SERP and scrapers.
auth_note: API access via hashed API key/token (permission levels); native proxy access via account ID + proxy user/password (Basic). Confirmed on docs.brightdata.com.
access_note: Self-serve signup with default API key auto-created, but scraping products involve KYC/compliance review before some zones activate.
mcp_note: Bright Data ships an official MCP server for its Web Unlocker/SERP/scraper APIs.
main_blocker: KYC/compliance approval for some scraping zones; usage-based cost.

name: Sherlock
one_liner: Open-source CLI to hunt usernames across 400+ social networks.
auth_note: Local open-source CLI tool; no hosted API and no auth. It fetches public profile URLs directly and needs no API keys.
access_note: Free open-source (MIT); install via pipx/pip/Docker. Not a SaaS API - runs locally.
mcp_note: No official/community MCP; it is a standalone Python CLI (single-purpose OSINT lookup).
main_blocker: None as a wrapped callable skill/CLI; no hosted API exists to call remotely.

name: Waterfall.io
one_liner: B2B contact and company data waterfall enrichment API.
auth_note: API key passed in x-api-key header to api.waterfall.io; ~13 endpoints for contact/company enrichment, prospecting, verification. Confirmed on docs.waterfall.io.
access_note: Public docs exist, but B2B data product requires a paid account/credits; self-serve vs sales-onboarding not confirmed from docs.
mcp_note: No official or community MCP server found.
main_blocker: Paid B2B-data credentials required; obscure vendor, onboarding path unclear.

name: Clay
one_liner: GTM data enrichment and automation platform, no standalone public API.
auth_note: No traditional public REST API to call Clay from outside. Integration is via in-platform HTTP API blocks and inbound webhooks; a limited Enterprise API exists for people/company lookups (key-based).
access_note: No self-serve external API; programmatic use is webhook ingestion or an Enterprise-gated lookup API. Confirmed by Clay's own docs.
mcp_note: No official Clay MCP server confirmed.
main_blocker: No public retrieval API; external access limited to webhooks or Enterprise-gated lookup API.

name: GitHub
one_liner: Code hosting, version control and CI/CD platform.
auth_note: Fine-grained/classic personal access tokens, OAuth apps, and GitHub App installation tokens; all self-generated.
access_note: Free account; create PAT or OAuth/GitHub App instantly. Higher rate limits when authenticated.
mcp_note: Official GitHub MCP server (github/github-mcp-server).
main_blocker: none

name: Vercel
one_liner: Frontend cloud for deploying and hosting web apps.
auth_note: Bearer access tokens created in account settings (scopable to teams); OAuth for building integrations.
access_note: Free/hobby account; create access token instantly. All endpoints under api.vercel.com.
mcp_note: Official Vercel MCP server documented at vercel.com/docs/mcp.
main_blocker: none

name: Netlify
one_liner: Web hosting and serverless platform for frontend sites.
auth_note: Personal access tokens (Bearer) generated in UI; OAuth2 for public integrations.
access_note: Free account; generate PAT instantly. REST base api.netlify.com/api/v1.
mcp_note: Official Netlify MCP server (uses personal access token).
main_blocker: none

name: Cloudflare
one_liner: CDN, DNS, edge compute and network security platform.
auth_note: Scoped API tokens (user or account) self-created in dashboard; legacy global API key also supported.
access_note: Free account; create scoped tokens instantly with granular permissions.
mcp_note: Official Cloudflare MCP servers (multiple, cloudflare/mcp-server-cloudflare).
main_blocker: none

name: Supabase
one_liner: Open-source Postgres backend-as-a-service platform.
auth_note: Management API uses personal access token; per-project auto-gen REST/GraphQL use anon/service API keys; OAuth for third-party apps.
access_note: Free tier project; generate access token instantly. Auto-generated APIs per project.
mcp_note: Official Supabase MCP server (supabase/mcp).
main_blocker: none

name: Neo4j
one_liner: Native graph database with Cypher query language.
auth_note: Query API/Bolt use basic auth (user:password) or tokens; Aura provisioning API uses OAuth client credentials.
access_note: Free Aura tier / self-managed; HTTP Query API enabled by default on current versions.
mcp_note: Official Neo4j MCP server (neo4j/mcp) plus Neo4j Labs community servers.
main_blocker: none

name: Snowflake
one_liner: Cloud data warehouse and analytics platform.
auth_note: SQL REST API authenticates via OAuth or key-pair (RSA) JWT; key-pair setup adds friction.
access_note: Self-serve 30-day free trial for credentials; production requires paid account.
mcp_note: Official Snowflake-managed MCP server and Snowflake-Labs/mcp (Cortex AI).
main_blocker: Key-pair/JWT auth setup complexity and trial-only free credentials.

name: MongoDB Atlas
one_liner: Managed cloud MongoDB database service.
auth_note: Admin API uses Service Accounts (OAuth2 client-credentials, recommended) or API keys with HTTP digest auth.
access_note: Free M0 tier; create keys/service accounts instantly. Admin API v2 REST.
mcp_note: Official MongoDB MCP server (mongodb-js/mongodb-mcp-server) covers Atlas.
main_blocker: none

name: Datadog
one_liner: Cloud monitoring, observability and security platform.
auth_note: Requires DD-API-KEY header plus DD-APPLICATION-KEY for many endpoints; both self-generated.
access_note: Self-serve 14-day free trial / limited free tier; keys created in UI. Region-specific site.
mcp_note: Official Datadog MCP server (OAuth via marketplace, preview).
main_blocker: none

name: Sentry
one_liner: Application error monitoring and performance tracing.
auth_note: Bearer auth tokens (org/user/internal integration); OAuth for public integrations.
access_note: Free tier account; generate auth tokens instantly. Web API v0.
mcp_note: Official Sentry MCP server (getsentry/sentry-mcp).
main_blocker: none

name: Notion
one_liner: Connected workspace for notes, docs, databases, and wikis.
auth_note: Internal integration static token, public OAuth 2.0, and personal access tokens (Bearer); confirmed on developers.notion.com.
access_note: Free to create integrations; free Notion plan supports API access.
mcp_note: Official hosted remote MCP server at mcp.notion.com with OAuth and ~13 tools.
main_blocker: none

name: Airtable
one_liner: Spreadsheet-database hybrid for building custom apps and workflows.
auth_note: Web API uses personal access tokens (Bearer) and OAuth 2.0; introduction page confirms REST semantics but not auth details directly.
access_note: Free plan supports API; PATs created self-serve from account.
mcp_note: No official Airtable MCP found; community/third-party MCP servers exist.
main_blocker: none

name: Linear
one_liner: Issue tracking and project management for software teams.
auth_note: OAuth 2.0 or personal API keys; confirmed on linear.app/developers.
access_note: Personal API keys free from settings; free plan available.
mcp_note: Official remote MCP server at mcp.linear.app with OAuth 2.1 and 25+ tools.
main_blocker: none

name: Jira
one_liner: Atlassian issue tracking and agile project management platform.
auth_note: OAuth 2.0 (3LO), Basic auth with API token, and JWT for Connect apps; confirmed on developer.atlassian.com security overview.
access_note: Free Jira Cloud tier; API tokens self-serve, OAuth apps via dev console.
mcp_note: Official Atlassian remote MCP server (mcp.atlassian.com), GA Feb 2026, OAuth 2.1.
main_blocker: none

name: Asana
one_liner: Work management platform for tasks, projects, and team workflows.
auth_note: Personal access tokens, OAuth 2.0, and OpenID Connect; confirmed on developers.asana.com overview.
access_note: PATs free from developer console; free Asana plan supports API.
mcp_note: Official Asana MCP server documented with tools reference and compatible clients.
main_blocker: none

name: Monday.com
one_liner: Customizable work OS for project, sales, and dev management.
auth_note: API tokens (admin/member) and OAuth; confirmed GraphQL on developer.monday.com. Does not cover Workforms.
access_note: API token free on all paid plans; free plan API access limited.
mcp_note: Official monday MCP server at mcp.monday.com, OAuth, ~20 tools; all plans.
main_blocker: none

name: ClickUp
one_liner: All-in-one productivity app for tasks, docs, and goals.
auth_note: Personal token (pk_ prefix) and OAuth 2.0 authorization code; confirmed on developer.clickup.com.
access_note: Personal token free from settings; free ClickUp plan supports API.
mcp_note: No confirmed official ClickUp MCP; community MCP servers exist.
main_blocker: none

name: Coda
one_liner: Doc-database platform combining documents, tables, and automations.
auth_note: Bearer API token confirmed on coda.io/developers; OAuth not shown on the v1 API page.
access_note: API tokens free from account settings; free Coda plan supports API.
mcp_note: No confirmed official Coda MCP; community/Composio-provided MCP available.
main_blocker: none

name: Smartsheet
one_liner: Enterprise work management on a spreadsheet-style grid interface.
auth_note: 3-legged OAuth 2.0 and raw API access token (Bearer); confirmed on developers.smartsheet.com auth guide.
access_note: API tokens self-serve but generally require a paid/trial account; no durable free developer tier.
mcp_note: No official or well-known community Smartsheet MCP confirmed.
main_blocker: paid/trial account required to obtain API credentials

name: Harvest
one_liner: Time tracking and invoicing for teams and freelancers.
auth_note: Personal access token with Harvest-Account-Id header, and OAuth 2.0; confirmed on help.getharvest.com API v2 docs.
access_note: PAT self-serve from Developers section; free/limited Harvest plan available.
mcp_note: No official Harvest MCP; Composio provides a Harvest MCP wrapper.
main_blocker: none

name: Stripe
one_liner: Online payment processing and financial infrastructure platform
auth_note: Secret API keys sent as Bearer credential; OAuth2 for Connect platforms and the remote MCP server.
access_note: Self-serve API keys with a full test/sandbox mode; live mode requires standard business account activation but no manual approval to develop.
mcp_note: Official remote MCP server at mcp.stripe.com (~23 billing/payments tools) plus docs search; verified on docs.stripe.com/mcp.
main_blocker: None; free self-serve test keys and broad REST API.

name: Plaid
one_liner: Bank-account data connectivity and financial account-linking API
auth_note: client_id + secret passed in body or PLAID-CLIENT-ID / PLAID-SECRET headers (JSON over HTTPS).
access_note: Free Sandbox with self-serve client_id/secret on signup; Production access requested via Dashboard and subject to compliance/approval review.
mcp_note: No confirmed official Plaid MCP server found.
main_blocker: Production access gated by Plaid approval and compliance review.

name: Binance
one_liner: Cryptocurrency exchange trading and market-data API
auth_note: API key plus signed payload; signature via HMAC-SHA256 (or Ed25519/RSA keys) on signed endpoints. REST + WebSocket + FIX.
access_note: Spot/Futures testnet keys are self-serve; production API keys require a KYC-verified Binance account, with regional/geo restrictions.
mcp_note: No official Binance MCP; several community Binance MCP servers exist.
main_blocker: KYC-verified account required for production keys; geo restrictions.

name: Paygent Connect
one_liner: Japanese online payment gateway with embedded checkout module
auth_note: Mutual-TLS client certificate plus merchant connection ID and connection password (configured in provided modules).
access_note: Requires a Paygent merchant contract (Japan); test and production module credentials/certs issued only after onboarding. No public self-serve API.
mcp_note: No MCP server.
main_blocker: Merchant contract with Paygent required; Japan-only, no self-serve signup, docs behind onboarding.

name: iPayX
one_liner: FX forensic-audit MCP layer for cross-border payments
auth_note: Free tools (rate check, source compare, rate-limited audit) are unauthenticated; full forensic report requires a Bearer API key (paid per report).
access_note: Public MCP endpoint, no signup for free/rate-limited tools; paid forensic reports gated behind an API key. FINTRAC-registered.
mcp_note: The product IS an official MCP server (iPAYX-Technologies/mcp-fx-audit); marketed as first FX forensic-audit MCP. No conventional REST API; ipayx.ai/docs returns 404.
main_blocker: Narrow scope (FX audit only); full reports paid, but free tools are self-serve via public MCP.

name: QuickBooks
one_liner: QuickBooks Online cloud accounting API
auth_note: OAuth 2.0 only; no API keys or basic auth.
access_note: Free developer account with up to 5 pre-populated sandbox companies; development self-serve, marketplace publishing needs Intuit review.
mcp_note: No Intuit-official MCP; community and Composio-hosted QuickBooks MCP available.
main_blocker: None for development; sandbox self-serve.

name: Xero
one_liner: Xero cloud accounting API for small businesses
auth_note: OAuth 2.0 required for all integrations; client id/secret from developer portal.
access_note: Free Xero account with a demo company and self-serve app registration; uncertified public apps capped at 25 connections until app-store certification.
mcp_note: Official MCP server XeroAPI/xero-mcp-server (@xeroapi/xero-mcp-server).
main_blocker: None; demo company and app registration are self-serve.

name: Brex
one_liner: Corporate cards and spend-management API
auth_note: User API tokens (Bearer) self-serve for account/card admins; OAuth 2.0 for partner apps authenticating other Brex accounts.
access_note: Requires a Brex business account; admins self-serve create scoped API tokens under Settings > Developer. Partner OAuth credentials are application-gated.
mcp_note: Official Brex MCP documented at developer.brex.com/docs/mcp.
main_blocker: Requires an approved Brex business account (US business underwriting) to obtain tokens.

name: Ramp
one_liner: Corporate cards and finance-automation / spend-management API
auth_note: OAuth 2.0 with client_credentials (server-to-server) and authorization_code (delegated) grants; additive scopes.
access_note: Free self-serve sandbox at demo-api.ramp.com with its own OAuth app/credentials; production requires a Ramp business account and production app credentials.
mcp_note: Official Ramp MCP server (ramp-public/ramp_mcp) documented at docs.ramp.com.
main_blocker: Production needs an approved Ramp business account; sandbox itself is self-serve.

name: PitchBook
one_liner: Private-capital market research data API (enterprise-gated)
auth_note: API key / auth token issued by PitchBook's Direct Data team after contract.
access_note: Standalone paid enterprise contract via the Direct Data team; a sandbox is provided only to contracted clients. No self-serve signup.
mcp_note: No public MCP; Premium Connectors integrate ChatGPT/Perplexity for enterprise-licensed clients only.
main_blocker: Enterprise contact-sales gate; paid standalone license, no self-serve credentials.

name: NotebookLM
one_liner: Google's AI research and note-taking assistant
auth_note: Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 bearer token (gcloud auth print-access-token); no consumer API key.
access_note: No public/consumer API. Only a NotebookLM Enterprise API on Google Cloud (Preview), requiring enterprise licensing and setup.
mcp_note: No official MCP server; only unofficial community clients exist for the Enterprise API.
main_blocker: No self-serve API; programmatic access is enterprise-only via a licensed Google Cloud NotebookLM Enterprise deployment.

name: Otter AI
one_liner: AI meeting transcription, notes and insights assistant
auth_note: Official MCP server is OAuth-authenticated with granular permissions; a public REST API for CRM/system integrations was also introduced.
access_note: MCP server and public API are enterprise-focused; MCP setup requires an enterprise account / demo request rather than open self-serve.
mcp_note: Confirmed official Otter MCP Server (help.otter.ai) plus multiple community MCP servers/CLIs.
main_blocker: MCP/API access is gated behind enterprise plans (demo request), limiting self-serve building.

name: Fathom
one_liner: AI meeting notetaker with transcripts and summaries
auth_note: API key auth for own use; OAuth2 for building installable public apps. 60 calls/min across keys.
access_note: Self-serve: generate an API key and make first call in minutes.
mcp_note: No official MCP; several community MCP servers wrap the public API (e.g. trevorwelch/fathom-video-mcp).
main_blocker: None significant; public self-serve REST API with SDKs (TypeScript, Python) and webhooks.

name: Consensus
one_liner: AI search engine over scientific research papers
auth_note: MCP uses OAuth (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, etc.); direct/enterprise API uses API key as Bearer token.
access_note: Quick-search API is application-only (baseline ~$0.10/call plus platform fee); results tiered by Consensus plan. Enterprise/unlimited requires contacting Consensus.
mcp_note: Confirmed official MCP server at mcp.consensus.app/mcp with OAuth for major clients.
main_blocker: Direct API access is by application only and paid per-call; MCP is easier but results are plan-limited.

name: Reducto
one_liner: Document parsing and extraction API for AI
auth_note: API key created in Reducto Studio; set via REDUCTO_API_KEY env var.
access_note: Sign up free at studio.reducto.ai, get credits, then pay-as-you-go (Standard tier) with no sales gate.
mcp_note: No official MCP server found; offers REST API plus Python/Node/Go SDKs.
main_blocker: None significant; self-serve API key and credits, though usage is metered/paid.

name: Devin
one_liner: Autonomous AI software engineer agent
auth_note: API key as Bearer token (Authorization header), optional X-Org-Id, for both REST API and MCP server.
access_note: API access limited to paid Team/Enterprise plans; self-serve consumer tiers (Free/Pro/Max) do not include programmatic API access.
mcp_note: Confirmed official Devin MCP server at mcp.devin.ai/mcp (sessions, playbooks, knowledge, scheduling).
main_blocker: Programmatic API/MCP key requires a paid Team or Enterprise plan.

name: higgsfield
one_liner: AI image, video and media generation suite
auth_note: Cloud API uses API credentials (env vars) via higgsfield-client SDK; CLI uses device-flow login.
access_note: Self-serve CLI (curl/brew/npm) and Cloud API; generation consumes paid credits.
mcp_note: Official CLI + agent 'skills' repo (higgsfield-ai/skills); MCP support claimed in marketing but not confirmed on official docs.
main_blocker: Public Higgsfield Cloud REST API exists but docs are thin and usage is credit/paid.

name: Mermaid CLI
one_liner: Open-source CLI rendering Mermaid diagrams to images
auth_note: Local open-source tool (mmdc); no authentication required.
access_note: Free open-source, installable via npm (@mermaid-js/mermaid-cli) or Docker.
mcp_note: No MCP server; it is a local diagram-rendering CLI.
main_blocker: None; open-source local CLI directly callable as a skill (input .mmd, output SVG/PNG/PDF).

name: YouTube Transcript
one_liner: Third-party API for YouTube video transcripts
auth_note: Bearer token API key in Authorization header; key from TranscriptAPI dashboard.
access_note: Self-serve with 100 free credits; credit/paid model beyond that.
mcp_note: No official MCP server found; straightforward REST endpoints (transcript, search, channel, playlist).
main_blocker: None significant; self-serve REST API with free starter credits.

name: Grain
one_liner: AI meeting recorder and notetaker for teams
auth_note: Personal Access Tokens and Workspace Access Tokens (Bearer) are self-serve; OAuth2 (auth-code + PKCE) requires registering an app with Grain. Uses Public-Api-Version header.
access_note: PAT/WAT self-serve in settings; workspace API available on the Business plan. OAuth for third-party apps is gated on registration.
mcp_note: No official MCP server confirmed. Official docs describe a REST API (some older sources mention a GraphQL API + TypeScript SDK).
main_blocker: Full workspace API requires a paid Business plan; OAuth apps need manual Grain registration.
